# Red Resumes

Red Resumes is an AI-powered resume builder, optimization, and career preparation platform designed to help candidates beat Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and excel in mock interviews.

## Core Services

- **AI Resume Builder**: Create modern, professional, creative, and technical resumes using ATS-optimized templates.
- **ATS Resume Checker**: Analyze your resume against target job descriptions to compute compatibility scores, extract missing keywords, and suggest improvements.
- **Resume Analysis**: Scan PDF resumes to extract structured user profiles.
- **Mock Interview Platform**: Practice realistic Google Meet-style mock interviews with real-time video/microphone streams, whiteboards, and AI-powered performance debriefs.
- **Resume Optimization**: Improve professional summaries, bullet points, and key terms using Gemini AI.
- **Job Application Tools**: Track, manage, and optimize job applications.

## Keywords & Ranking Focus
- AI Resume Builder
- ATS Resume Checker
- Resume Analysis
- Mock Interview Platform
- Resume Optimization
- Job Application Tools

## Contact
- Website: https://redresumes.com/
- Support: support@redresumes.com
